name: flutter-figma-skills
description: Skills for reproducing Flutter UI from Figma designs with high fidelity, via a 5-phase orchestrated pipeline.

plugins.name: flutter-figma-reproduce
plugins.description: Reproduces a Flutter UI page from a Figma design via a 5-phase pipeline (align tokens / build skeleton / fill styles / add states & interaction / verify). Supports safe / fast / auto modes.
